text.title: Survey Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: do interviews first; quant without qual is shooting in the dark

branch.question: Can recruitment hit N>=120 per segment?

example.trace: qual=done -> reach=yes -> draft 11 questions, lint, pilot, launch at N>=120.

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
